description_long: This is a large, modern luxury house complex featuring multiple interconnected rectangular structures with flat and low-hipped roofs. The property includes a spacious blue tennis court, a swimming pool, and landscaped areas with shrubs and trees. The exterior is primarily clad in gray stone or concrete panels, with large glass windows providing ample natural light. The main building is flanked by two smaller wings, and there are visible outdoor amenities such as a hot tub and lounge areas. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall, and the overall layout is open and expansive, suggesting a high-end urban residence. The design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern luxury house complex with flat and hipped roofs, large glass windows, a tennis court, pool, and landscaped grounds. The exterior is finished in gray stone or concrete panels, with multiple wings and open outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central building with a dark hipped roof, pool, hot tub, and tennis court to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court in the foreground, with the main house and pool area behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tennis court on the left, central house structure, and additional outdoor lounge areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, landscaped areas, and the pool behind the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent door, minimal steps, no porch, and clean geometric lines
